blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
